title: Chat, who can intro me to them? would love to hook them up w/ ChatGPT Pro sub & introduce them to Codex too!

content.summary: Chat, who can intro me to them? would love to hook them up w/ ChatGPT Pro sub & introduce them to Codex too! Madrid Zone (@theMadridZone) 🚨 BREAKING: Former Real Madrid nutritionist Itziar Gonzalez says on IG that Real Madrid have been asking the "free version of ChatGPT" what supplements they should give the players, and that's what they give them. — https://nitter.net/theMadridZone/status/2036537282614747366#m
